title: tf.keras.layers.MultiHeadAttention  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
MultiHeadAttention layer.
Inherits From:Layer,Operation
This is an implementation of multi-headed attention as described in the
paper "Attention is all you Need"Vaswani et al., 2017.
Ifquery,key,valueare the same, then
this is self-attention. Each timestep inqueryattends to the
corresponding sequence inkey, and returns a fixed-width vector.
